title: Sweet Rhythm
overview: Jennifer, a young Jazz enthusiast, is struggling to embrace her love for music while trying to win her mothers approval when she meets the rebellious hippie Stephanie, and the Rock'n'Roll musician Dani, who flip her world inside out and take her on a disco groovin', rockin' rollin' and jazz swinging adventure across the 70s to save the family diner.
